title: alyssum calycinum var. ruderale
intro: Alyssum calycinum var. ruderale, also known as Mountain Sweet Alyssum, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mountain Sweet Alyssum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote better sleep. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
